{
  "choice": "C",
  "answer_value": "RNPs, envelope, RBDs",
  "rationale": "The visualization shows the internal structure of the SARS-CoV-2 particle. The center of the particle is occupied by the ribonucleoprotein (RNP) complexes, which are yellow. Surrounding the RNPs is the lipid envelope, depicted in gray. The spike proteins, which are the RBDs, are shown in red and are located on the outermost layer. Therefore, the correct order from the center outward is RNPs, envelope, RBDs."

parsed.rationale: The visualization shows the internal structure of the SARS-CoV-2 particle. The center of the particle is occupied by the ribonucleoprotein (RNP) complexes, which are yellow. Surrounding the RNPs is the lipid envelope, depicted in gray. The spike proteins, which are the RBDs, are shown in red and are located on the outermost layer. Therefore, the correct order from the center outward is RNPs, envelope, RBDs.
